sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32408" key="e)klugi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκλῠγίζω</orth>, <sense id="n32408.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twist exceedingly,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐκλελυγισμέναι ὀρχήσεις</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mazy</tr_> dances, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:1:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
